first_conjugation.title: 1st Conjugation
first_conjugation.purpose: Train present-tense 1st-conjugation verbs as tiny, measurable atoms.
first_conjugation.uiSignature: Six pronoun chips above the prompt card. Central verb card. Heatmap below. Coral highlight for removable infinitive ending / mutable slot during guided stages.
subdeckRules: Keep regular core verbs separate from irregular stem-change verbs.
For choose2/choose4/fullChoice, options must come from the same verb paradigm only.
Do not expose cross-verb distractors until at least typeFragment stage in mixed review, and even there only if explicitly enabled.

second_conjugation.title: 2nd Conjugation
second_conjugation.purpose: Train present-tense 2nd-conjugation verbs, with explicit isolation of irregular я-forms.
second_conjugation.uiSignature: Same pronoun strip as 1st conjugation, plus a compact irregular-я banner whenever the current verb is flagged irregular.
subdeckRules: Keep regular core verbs, exception verbs, and perfective-future reference verbs in separate subdecks.
Surface irregular я-form hints only in Preview and first two Guided attempts; remove them once the atom reaches Full Choice.
Perfective-future reference verbs must never appear in the default 2nd-conjugation Resume flow.

past_tense.title: Past Tense
past_tense.purpose: Convert known verbs into past tense with gender/number awareness.
past_tense.uiSignature: Four gender/number chips (masc, fem, neut, plural) across the top. For я/ты sentences, show a user gender badge or explicit gender selector.
subdeckRules: Start with endings, then full forms, then sentence conversion.
Do not force the user to guess speaker gender for я/ты; the UI must supply it.
Special verbs быть and есть belong in their own subdeck.

core_patterns.title: Core Patterns
core_patterns.purpose: Drill fixed high-utility frames like future быть and у ... есть.
core_patterns.uiSignature: Frame-builder layout. The stable frame is neutral ink; the changing slot is coral during guided stages.
subdeckRules: Teach the owner phrase itself before mixing in nouns.
Keep future быть and у ... есть separate in the UI.

days_time_routine.title: Days + Time + Routine
days_time_routine.purpose: Drill calendar words, time phrases, and short routine expressions from the notes.
days_time_routine.uiSignature: Week strip for days, tile board for time phrases, compact routine sentence card for daily-life lines.
subdeckRules: Teach bare day names and on-day forms separately before mixing.
Treat time phrases as a closed set; do not infer full clock language beyond the canonical list.

descriptions.title: Descriptions
descriptions.purpose: Train adjective agreement, colors, and possessive pronouns using only learned nouns and phrases.
descriptions.uiSignature: Agreement matrix (masc, fem, neut, plural) pinned above the practice card. Noun gender badge visible early, hidden later.
subdeckRules: Teach adjective forms and possessive forms separately before combining them into noun phrases.
Invariant possessives его, её, их must be shown explicitly as invariant across all noun genders.

nouns_plurals.title: Nouns + Plurals
nouns_plurals.purpose: Drill noun gender, regular plural patterns, irregular plurals, and invariant nouns.
nouns_plurals.uiSignature: Rule-group board with compact badges for gender and plural type.
subdeckRules: Regular, irregular, and invariant nouns must be in separate subdecks.
Do not hide plural type labels during Preview.

numbers.title: Numbers
numbers.purpose: Drill the exact closed number set found in the notes, plus the first three ordinals.
numbers.uiSignature: Large digit card on the left, Russian phrase on the right, with age-context mini-cards below.
subdeckRules: Do not extrapolate beyond the reviewed closed set in this package.
Treat age phrases as their own tiny pack.

conversation.title: Conversation
conversation.purpose: Drill fixed greeting/introduction/closing lines and one canonical intro dialogue.
conversation.uiSignature: Chat-bubble style practice card with alternating left/right alignment in dialogue modes.
subdeckRules: This is not open-ended chat. Only canonical lines and templates from the package should be used.
Dialogue ordering should use the provided canonical dialogue script.

vocabulary.title: Vocabulary
vocabulary.purpose: Drill meaning and production for the exact lexical packs from the notes.
vocabulary.uiSignature: Pack chips across the top, simple word card in the middle, optional phrase strip below for phraseGuided stage.
subdeckRules: Keep packs semantically tight; do not mix random categories in early stages.
The adult slang/profanity pack is opt-in and hidden by default.
